title: Update jsdoc-to-markdown to version 2.0.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [jsdoc-to-markdown](https://www.npmjs.com/package/jsdoc-to-markdown) just published its new version 2.0.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency jsdoc-to-markdown
New version 2.0.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of jsdoc-to-markdown. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 149 commits . - [`22f97b6`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/22f97b670abdf28e2abe27c5373787d11a2a042c) 2.0.1 - [`5c79856`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/5c79856ef28a85cf67a1000ae2a3e6d9b67957ca) upgrade deps - [`5a2d9fb`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/5a2d9fb823db8f0b46d8fb70ac9a66c95258ec60) .clear() docs - [`840fc77`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/840fc77de9a77df1118399e7789d8fa7c3a9d7c0) update .clear() docs - [`d9fb19b`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/d9fb19b93edf791a31d1cfb50e1b1b62098e8598) 2.0.0 - [`10ff1b3`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/10ff1b35df144927d0b4b9669de5089dbb6e2fb8) readme - [`97ac0a6`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/97ac0a6a613541e3af008e99fec8169054b5fe9e) readme - [`24025b4`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/24025b45d9b044bb3e5478355467cc85bac5d25e) more tests - [`a4530a0`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/a4530a01472aaa6e6fd80f590bb6a601a33adbaa) 2.0.0-alpha.23 - [`de7f688`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/de7f688fc30eced8cbfca80d932d340130504889) deps.. jsdoc now receiving correct cache option - [`0f47f2d`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/0f47f2d9c15d46ca95b6b025eaaa860dc8e034f8) switch 'cache' option with 'no-cache'.. guaranteed exit.. linting, more tests - [`25dfd18`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/25dfd18b1ee50861af5f531c890d1cf7d8d22f4d) readme - [`5536e3b`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/5536e3b690614e24e31e1c8af46aed71749aa85f) API docs - [`c2e3185`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/c2e3185d4fde39b509d068f264e4ef2b120207f3) merge in next - [`ad3e9e7`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/jsdoc-to-markdown/commit/ad3e9e77aa9c4d08be75070734ec6e423277909c) deps There are 149 commits in total.
